meaning: n.鏃ユ檼,[鎽刔璐熸劅浣滅敤,鍙嶆劅浣滅敤
examples: Isunte ramie (linen, hemp) fibers resist solarization.
An optical glass which has excellent unsusceptibility to solarization and is prevented from generating platinum knots.
It's better to store the products indoor, and they should be covered to avoid the solarization and rain if stored outdoor.
